heroTagline.default: Where the work moves from podcast to practice.

heroPriceStrip.default: £25/month · No minimum term · Cancel any time

heroImage.description: Top banner photo for this page. Use a landscape JPG at least 1600x1000px. Smaller images will stretch and look blurry on big screens. PNG / HEIC work but JPG is half the file size.

introLead.default: The Reset Letters are the front door. The Reset Room is the room behind it.

introBody.default: This is where the work stops being something you read and starts being something you practice. A members-only video room, a monthly live call with me, and a growing vault of guided journeys. All for £25 a month.

pillar1Body.default: Two new intimate video sessions a month, the conversations that do not belong on the public feed. Watch in your own time, inside the room.

pillar1Bullets.default:
2 new sessions / month
Watch any time inside the room
Founding sessions already inside

pillar2Body.default: Ninety minutes with me, live on Zoom, first Thursday of every month. Bring your questions, sit with the group, leave with what you came for. Replay added to the room the next day.

pillar2Bullets.default:
1st Thursday, 7.30pm UK
90 minutes, group format
Replay live by Friday lunchtime

pillar3Body.default: A growing library of guided somatic journeys. Music, breath, visualisation, embodiment. New piece every month. Where insight becomes the actual life.

pillar3Bullets.default:
7 founding journeys at launch
New journey added monthly
Video + audio, watch eyes-closed

alsoIncluded1.default: Workshop replays — every workshop I have ever run, free for you inside.

alsoIncluded2.default: Forty-eight-hour members-only window on every new retreat before it goes public.

alsoIncluded3.default: Ten percent off all 1:1 Reset Sessions and One Day intensives.

alsoIncluded4.default: Members-only events that never go on the public calendar.

whoBody.default: The Reset Room is for the woman who has been reading the Reset Letters, doing the work on her own, and is ready for something that holds her more closely. Not therapy. Not a course. A room.

priceBody.default: No minimum term. Everything is delivered through the member portal you can come back to whenever you want.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of the page. Anna's 8 Jun mapping: The Reset + Pendulum Subconscious Healing.
